user.title: Add JH Fan
user.description: Scan for nearby JH Fan devices or enter MAC address manually.

discovery.title: Select Device
discovery.description: {count} device(s) found. Select one to add.

manual.title: Manual Setup
manual.description: Enter the MAC address of your JH Fan device.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Device Found
bluetooth_confirm.description:
A JH Fan device was discovered:

**{name}**
`{address}`

Confirm to add it.

configure.title: Configure {name}
configure.description:
Device: `{address}`

Select the maximum speed setting for this device.

error.no_devices_found: No JH Fan devices found. Make sure the device is powered on and in range.
